slides.label: EXPENSE TRACKING
slides.desc: Every expense in its category, instantly. No spreadsheets, no complications. Just open the app, enter the amount, and done — your history always up to date.

slides.label: VISUAL REPORTS
slides.desc: Clear charts showing where your money goes each month. By category, by week, by habit. You'll see patterns you never noticed before.

slides.label: WHATSAPP WITH AI
slides.desc: Send a message, an audio or a photo of the receipt and SAMU records it in the app automatically. No forms. No excuses. Just talk. Careful, SAMU likes to give advice 😜

phoneContent.label: How much did I spend today?

pro.name: Pro
features: WhatsApp AI bot to log expenses by chat
pro.trial: 7 days free to try the Pro plan
pro.disclaimer: Cancel anytime · No credit card for the Free plan

items.a: Yes. You can log expenses and income offline. The app saves them locally and syncs to the cloud as soon as you have a signal again. You never lose anything.

items.q: How does the WhatsApp bot work?
items.a: It's simple: add Samu as a WhatsApp contact and message what you spent, for example 'Lunch $1800'. He categorizes and records it automatically. You can also ask him how much you've spent this month.
Absolutely. Your data is transmitted encrypted and stored on secure servers. We don't share it with anyone or use it for advertising. Your financial information is yours and yours alone.

items.q: Can I use the app on multiple devices?
items.a: With the Pro plan, yes. Your account syncs in real time between phone, tablet, and web. With the Free plan, data is saved locally on the device where you entered it.

items.q: What happens when the free trial ends?
items.a: After 7 days, your account automatically switches to the Free plan. You won't be charged anything, and no card is required. If you want to keep Pro features, you can choose to subscribe then.
Yes. Vida Ordenada is available for iOS (iPhone and iPad), Android, and also from any web browser. Download it from the App Store, Google Play, or go directly to the web.
